<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ use Symfony\Polyfill\Php84 as p; if (\PHP_VERSION_ID >= 80400) { return; } if (extension_loaded('intl') && !function_exists('grapheme_str_split')) { function grapheme_str_split(string $string, int $length = 1): array|false { return p\Php84::grapheme_str_split($string, $length); } }
